# fur — Theme Sample

A paragraph with **bold**, *italic*, `inline code`, and a
[link](https://github.com/Benjamin-Connelly/fur). Soft-wrapped prose
reflows to the available width instead of stranding short fragments.

## Lists

- First item, long enough to wrap so you can see continuation reflow and
  the blank line that separates one item from the next
- Second item with `code` and **bold**
  - Nested child item

## Code

```go
func greet(name string) string {
    return fmt.Sprintf("hello, %s", name)
}
```

## Table

| Theme | Mode  | Family     |
|-------|-------|------------|
| nord  | dark  | Nord       |
| latte | light | Catppuccin |

> A blockquote to round out the sample.
